mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.content, t.target_type, t.target_filter, t.status, t.sender_id, t.sent_at, t.recipient_count, t.read_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yx_push_task WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND status = #{status}

SELECT ,
FROM yx_push_task t LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON t.sender_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_push_task SET status = 1, sent_at = NOW(), recipient_count = #{recipientCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_push_task SET status = 2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_push_task SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
